summary:
Dacomitinib has no established efficacy or safety profile in glioblastoma, with no clinical trial data supporting its use in this indication. It is FDA-approved solely for NSCLC and hematologic malignancies, not central nervous system tumors, and lacks evidence of blood-brain barrier penetration or tumor response in glioblastoma.  

\boxed{B}
